segments.text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. How can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Hi Michael, it's Bryan Nelson. I hope you're doing well!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Hey Bryan! I'm doing great, thanks for asking. What can I do for you today?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Well, I wanted to discuss getting a diagnostics check on my car again.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Of course! We can definitely get that sorted. Any specific issues you're noticing?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yeah, it’s been making a weird noise lately, especially when I accelerate.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: I see. That sounds like something we should take a closer look at.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Right. I’d like to get it done as soon as possible. When can I bring it in?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: We have openings this week. How does Thursday sound?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Thursday works for me. What time should I come in?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: How about 10 AM? We can perform a full vehicle diagnostics for $100.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sounds good. How long will that take?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: It usually takes about an hour. We'll call you with the results right after.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Perfect! I really appreciate your quick turnaround.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: No problem at all! We aim to provide immediate feedback.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Also, I wanted to ask about getting an oil change while I'm there.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: We can certainly do that! An oil change is $40 to $60, depending on the oil you choose.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Let’s do the standard one.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Great choice! I’ll schedule the diagnostics and oil change for you on Thursday at 10 AM.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Thank you! Is there anything else I should be aware of?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Just to bring any previous repair records if you have them; they might help us troubleshoot faster.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sure, I can do that.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Excellent! I’ll also prepare a quote for any other services we might recommend after the diagnostics.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sounds good, thank you for that!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: You’re welcome! I’ll see you Thursday at 10 AM, Bryan.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Looking forward to it! Have a great day, Michael.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: You too, Bryan! Take care.
segments.speaker: local party
